points.text: Individuals with symptoms of COVID-19 should consider getting tested to confirm infection.
Testing is essential for those who believe they may be infected with COVID-19.
Health care providers can perform accurate PCR tests for COVID-19 diagnosis.
Antigen tests can be used at home to detect active COVID-19 infections.
Those diagnosed with COVID-19 are advised to stay home and seek medical care.
Test for COVID-19 if you have symptoms of the illness.
Consider testing five days after coming in contact with the virus.
If you have symptoms of COVID-19, you should get tested to confirm if you have the virus.
Contact your doctor about testing if you are fully vaccinated and showing symptoms of COVID-19.
Children with symptoms of COVID-19 should seek medical care and consider getting tested.
